items.title: AMD's upcoming Ryzen 9 9950X3D2 listed around $1,000 at several retailers across Canada and the UK — New flagship dual-cache CPU might demand a hefty premium
items.description: Listings for the 9950X3D2 have started to pop up at many different vendors, with some even listing preliminary prices. We found the CPU going for roughly $1,000 at two Canadian retailers, and just a smidge below that at a UK-based website. For context, the standard 9950X3D with 3D V-Cache on only one CCD launched at $699.

Subscribe to our newsletter AMD's Ryzen 9 9950X3D2 entered the rumor mill last year and was a glaring omission from the company's CES 2026 show, but it was finally made official last month with an announcement video. However, AMD did not unveil the chip's price, which is expected to demand a hefty premium given the monstrous specs. Now, new listings have popped up around the globe that suggest the CPU will cost around $1,000, but do be aware that these could be placeholder prices and are, naturally, subject to change.The first two listings come from Canada — on PC-Canada.com, the 9950X3D2 is listed for $1,373.99 CAD, which translates to roughly $985 USD. Similarly, on shopBRC.com, the 9950X3D2 is going for $1,375 CAD, so basically $985 USD as well. Across the pond, in the United Kingdom, a retailer by the name of GamingKit has the CPU listed for 905.82 GBP (~$1,197 USD) with VAT, and 725.54 GBP (~$960) without it.Overall, we're looking at roughly $1,000 as the asking price for the 9950X3D2, but keep in mind that AMD hasn't announced the MSRP yet, so all this is subject to change. Despite its flagship stature, the Ryzen 9 9950X3D2 will likely not land around $1,000 because the chip one tier below it, the 9950X3D, launched at $699. A more premium version of the same CPU, therefore, would likely be $100, or possibly $200, more expensive.Article continues below You may like AMD Ryzen 9 9950X3D2 unveiled as first dual-cache X3D CPU Where to buy AMD's Ryzen 7 9850X3D AMD's next gaming champ to debut at $499, and you can already buy it ahead of launch Image 1 of 3(Image credit: Future)(Image credit: Future)(Image credit: Future)As a reminder, the 9950X3D2's claim to fame is its enormous 192 MB of L3 cache, made possible by stacking it atop (underneath, actually) both core clusters. We're looking at 96 MB per CCD; 32 MB is the native on-die L3 cache, and 64 MB is the added X3D cache. There's a total of 208 MB of combined cache on the 9950X3D2, which has pushed its TDP to 200W, up from 170W on the standard 9950X3D.The chip features 16 cores and 32 threads, based on the Zen 5 microarchitecture, that can boost up to 5.6 GHz. AMD is marketing it as its top-end CPU for both gaming and productivity, so all that remains to see is what the 9950X3D2 will actually cost. Let's just hope AMD isn't inspired by Overclockers UK, where it has a placeholder price of a casual 100,000 GBP (~$132,000 USD)Searching the part number on Google brings up many more listings from around the world, but none of them have prices. We even found the 9950X3D2 listed on B&H with pre-orders opening on April 22, which is the official release date AMD announced. These retailers might have stock ready to go, but can't actually sell it due to the purchase embargo.Even though this is the world's first dual-cache consumer CPU, Intel is also working on dual-compute tile SKUs for its next-gen Nova Lake-S family, which is said to carry up to 288 MB of bLLC (Big Last Level Cache) that will compete with AMD's X3D chips. Of course, that lineup will compete with AMD's own next-gen Zen 6 (and Zen 6 X3D), but it's nonetheless exciting to see the CPU wars return with such ferocity once again.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.
items.author: Hassam Nasir
items.titleZh: AMD Ryzen 9 9950X3D2在加拿大与英国多零售商处定价约1000美元——新款旗舰双缓存CPU或面临高昂溢价
items.descriptionZh:
AMD Ryzen 9 9950X3D2处理器于上月通过官方视频正式发布，此前它已流传于传闻中，并在CES 2026大会上缺席。尽管AMD公布了这款旗舰处理器，但未透露其价格，仅暗示其因规格强大而可能定价高昂。目前，全球多个零售商已列出该处理器的预售价格，普遍指向约1000美元价位，但这些价格可能仅为占位符，最终定价仍待AMD官方确认。

从技术角度来看，Ryzen 9 9950X3D2的最大亮点在于其创新的双缓存设计。该处理器基于Zen 5微架构，拥有16个核心和32个线程，最高加速频率可达5.6 GHz。其L3缓存总量达到192 MB，这是通过在每个核心复合体（CCD）上叠加缓存实现的：每个CCD包含32 MB原生片上L3缓存以及64 MB通过3D堆叠技术添加的X3D缓存，因此每个CCD具备96 MB L3缓存。加上L2缓存，处理器总缓存容量高达208 MB。这一设计也使得其热设计功耗（TDP）提升至200W，高于标准版9950X3D的170W。

性能方面，AMD将9950X3D2定位为面向顶级游戏和高负载生产力应用的高端CPU。巨大的缓存容量能显著降低内存延迟，提升对缓存敏感型工作负载（如游戏、渲染、编译等）的性能。虽然目前尚无官方基准测试数据，但其缓存规模的翻倍式增长预计将带来可观的性能提升，尤其是在游戏帧率和复杂计算任务的响应速度上。

从市场定价看，现有零售商报价包括：加拿大PC-Canada.com和shopBRC.com分别标价约1374加元（约合985美元）；英国GamingKit含税报价约906英镑（约1197美元），不含税约726英镑（约960美元）。综合来看，价格区间集中在1000美元左右。然而，考虑到其下一档型号9950X3D首发价为699美元，作为更高级版本，9950X3D2的最终溢价可能在100至200美元之间，因此实际建议零售价可能低于当前流出的占位价格。值得一提的是，英国Overclockers甚至一度列出高达10万英镑的夸张占位价，这显然不具参考性。

该处理器的技术影响深远：它是全球首款采用双缓存设计的消费级CPU，标志着3D堆叠缓存技术进入新阶段。这一创新不仅提升了单颗处理器的性能上限，也为未来多CCD与缓存堆叠的结合设立了新标杆。与此同时，竞争对手英特尔也在积极布局，其下一代Nova Lake-S家族预计将搭载最高288 MB的大容量末级缓存（bLLC），直接对标AMD的X3D系列产品。尽管英特尔新品将与AMD的Zen 6世代竞争，但当前9950X3D2的推出无疑加剧了高端CPU市场的技术角逐。

应用场景上，Ryzen 9 9950X3D2主要面向追求极致性能的用户群体，包括高端游戏玩家、专业内容创作者、工程师及科研人员。其大缓存设计特别适合处理大型数据集、实时仿真、高清视频剪辑及新一代高负载游戏引擎。

目前，多家零售商（如B&H）已列出该处理器，并显示预售将于4月22日开放，这与AMD公布的正式发售日期一致。虽然零售商可能已有库存，但因购买禁令限制，尚未正式开售。随着发售日临近，AMD预计将公布官方定价与性能评测，届时这款革命性处理器的市场表现将真正见分晓。

items.title: Iran threatens ‘complete and utter annihilation’ of OpenAI's $30B Stargate AI data center in Abu Dhabi — regime posts video with satellite imagery of ChatGPT-maker's premier 1GW data center
items.description: IRGC spokesperson threatens the “complete and utter annihilation” of U.S. and Israeli facilities. Singles out the $30bn Stargate AI data center.

Subscribe to our newsletter Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) has issued a clear public warning to the U.S. that any damage inflicted on Iran’s power infrastructure will be met with decisive retaliation. Specifically, IRGC spokesperson Brigadier General Ebrahim Zolfaghari threatened the “complete and utter annihilation” of U.S. and Israeli facilities. The ‘hidden’ $30 billion Stargate AI datacenter in Abu Dhabi was singled out as a juicy target for Iranian destruction later in the video. The threats come on the heels of Iran reportedly delivering enough damage via rocket strikes to some Amazon AWS data centers that they have shut down.Iran leveling upThey released a video of threatening to strike 1GW Stargate AI datacenter in the UAE.The data center is hidden on Google maps they even shown that pic.twitter.com/LuOGIp3BVjApril 3, 2026Go deeper with TH Premium: AI and data centers (Image credit: Microsoft)Photonics and high-speed data movement is the next big AI bottleneckThe data center cooling state of playMassive AI data center buildouts are squeezing energy suppliesUltra Ethernet: The data center interconnection of tomorrowAbove, you can see and hear Zolfaghari make the headlining threats against U.S. action in Iran. “Should the USA proceed with its threats concerning Iran’s power plant facilities the following retaliatory measures shall be promptly enacted,” declares the military spokesperson. “All power plants, energy infrastructure, and information and communications technology of the Zionist regime, and all similar companies within the region that have American shareholders shall face complete and utter annihilation.”After the remarks from Zolfaghari, the video switches to a shot of the Earth from space, which zooms into Abu Dhabi on Google Maps. A zone not far from the coast is then centered on, showing an apparently ‘empty’ area of desert. However, a message is overlaid on this bleak view, stating “Nothing stays hidden to our sight, though hidden by Google.” The video then switches to a ‘night vision’ view of the same area of the map with the full extent of the Stargate AI datacenter in Abu Dhabi clear to see.Article continues below You may like Iran claims it has hit Oracle data center in Dubai, Amazon data center in Bahrain Iran issues direct strike threat to Nvidia, Microsoft, Apple, Google, 14 other US tech companies Iran threatens Nvidia, Microsoft, other tech companies with strikes over alleged attack on Tehran bank Image 1 of 4(Image credit: IRGC video)(Image credit: IRGC video)(Image credit: IRGC video)(Image credit: IRGC video)Escalation potential or a bluff?One might query why Iran hasn’t already struck targets like the Stargate AI data center during the last month of hostilities if it were at all possible. It has already inflicted enough damage to disrupt operations at some Amazon AWS data centers. Perhaps these were just ‘lucky’ shots that managed to get through defenses deployed in the Gulf States. Moreover, Iran has made similar threats against Nvidia, Microsoft, Apple, Google, and 14 other U.S. tech companies over recent weeks.With neither side looking like it will cool down the rhetoric and throttle back on the use of force right now, we might actually find out whether Iran can mount a devastating attack on U.S. business-related data centers or not. There will be lives at stake, of course, people are working at these facilities, so it isn’t all about the $30 billion that has been sunk into these huge projects in the Middle East. items.titleZh: 伊朗威胁彻底毁灭OpenAI在阿布扎比的300亿美元"星际之门"AI数据中心——政权发布视频展示ChatGPT制造商首座1吉瓦级数据中心的卫星图像
items.descriptionZh:
伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）近日公开警告美国，若伊朗的电力基础设施遭到攻击，将对美国和以色列的相关设施进行“彻底毁灭性”报复。在发布的视频中，IRGC发言人埃布拉希姆·佐尔法加里准将特别点名了位于阿布扎比、价值约300亿美元的“Stargate”AI数据中心作为潜在打击目标，并展示了该中心在谷歌地图上被隐藏的区域，通过夜间视图揭示了其全貌。这一威胁紧随伊朗此前对亚马逊AWS数据中心造成破坏的报道，显示出地缘政治冲突正迅速蔓延至关键数字基础设施领域。

从技术背景来看，“Stargate”AI数据中心代表了当前AI算力基础设施的尖端水平，其规模高达1吉瓦（GW），专注于支持大规模人工智能训练与推理任务。数据中心的核心技术瓶颈正从传统计算转向光子学和高速数据移动——光子学技术利用光信号替代电信号进行数据传输，能显著提升带宽和能效，但面临集成复杂性和成本挑战；高速数据移动则涉及超以太网（Ultra Ethernet）等新型互连协议，旨在优化数据中心内部及跨数据中心的通信效率，以应对AI模型参数爆炸式增长带来的数据传输延迟问题。此外，大规模AI数据中心的建设加剧了能源供应压力，冷却技术成为关键创新点，例如采用液冷或浸没式冷却方案来管理高密度算力产生的热量，确保系统稳定运行。

在性能参数方面，“Stargate”数据中心作为中东地区的核心AI枢纽，其1GW的功耗规模相当于一座大型发电站的输出，投资额高达300亿美元，突显了AI基础设施的资本密集特性。与常规云数据中心相比，此类专用AI设施通常搭载英伟达、AMD等公司的先进AI芯片（如GPU或ASIC），通过高速互连实现千卡乃至万卡集群，以支持万亿参数模型的训练。然而，新闻中未提供具体的算力对比数据，但参考行业趋势，这类数据中心旨在提供每秒百亿亿次（ExaFLOPs）级别的AI计算能力，推动下一代大语言模型和生成式AI应用的发展。

技术影响和应用场景深远。一方面，AI数据中心成为地缘政治中的战略目标，暴露了全球数字基础设施在冲突中的脆弱性，可能迫使科技公司重新评估数据中心的地理分布和安全措施，例如加强物理防护或采用分布式架构。另一方面，此类威胁事件可能延缓AI创新步伐，因为数据中心的中断会影响模型训练和服务部署，波及云计算、自动驾驶、医疗AI等依赖大规模算力的行业。从长远看，这或加速对边缘计算和去中心化AI解决方案的探索，以降低集中式风险。

总体而言，IRGC的威胁不仅凸显了军事冲突与科技产业的交织，也反映了AI数据中心作为国家关键资产的重要性。随着AI技术持续渗透各领域，保障其基础设施的韧性和安全将成为全球性挑战，同时推动光子学、高效冷却和能源管理技术的创新迭代。未来，行业需在性能提升与风险缓解之间寻求平衡，以维持AI生态的稳定发展。

items.title: Intel's upcoming Wildcat Lake low-budget CPUs leak out again — OEM confirms specs for Core 7 350, Core 5 320, & Core 3 305 in first retail product datasheet
items.description: Wildcat Lake is Intel's upcoming family of low-budget and low-power CPUs intended for OEMs. We've already seen many leaks surrounding this family, but now a new product from Advantech has listed three SKUs in a datasheet for its MIO-5356 SBC. This confirms the specs from prior leaks and signals that a launch is due soon.

Subscribe to our newsletter Intel has been working on its Wildcat Lake CPUs for a while now, but it's only recently that we've started to get numerous leaks surrounding this family. A couple of weeks ago, we covered the Core 5 304, which appeared on Geekbench and was twice as fast as its predecessor. Today, an OEM by the name of Advantech has indirectly confirmed specs for three more SKUs as part of the first official, commercially available Wildcat Lake product.Go deeper with TH Premium: CPU (Image credit: Tom's Hardware)CPU scaling with DLSSRyzen to the top: How AMD innovated in the gaming CPU marketHow ARM is working its way into PCsAMD CES 2026 gaming trends press Q&A roundtable transcriptAdvantech listed the Core 7 350, Core 5 320, and Core 3 305 for its MIO-5356 single-board computer, which is intended for embedded and edge use cases. The datasheet provided on the website mentions these chips as options to kit out the MIO-5356 with. They all have the same 2P+4LP-E core layout with 15W TDPs, though it's rumored that they can go up to 25W in PL2. The Core 7 320 and Core 5 320 seemingly carry 32 EUs while the Core 3 305 has 16 EUs for its iGPU. (Image credit: Advantech)Wildcat Lake is expected to use the Cougar Cove architecture for P-cores and Darkmont for LP-E cores, which would bring it to parity with Panther Lake. That's why this series is supposed to be branded under the Core 300 family, just without the "Ultra" moniker. Wildcat Lake is the successor to Twin Lake, which itself was a refresh of Alder Lake-N; both of those only had Gracemont E-cores.Article continues below You may like Intel's "Wildcat Lake" Core 3 304 is twice as fast in single-core performance versus last-gen Intel keeps socket LGA 1700 alive with new P-core-only CPUs Intel Bartlett Lake-S CPUs reportedly wield 12 blazing P-cores and 5.8 GHz boost The MIO-5356 has other niche features such as EdgeBMC remote management, dual LAN ports powered by Intel i210 and i226 controllers, CAN-FD communication protocol, GPIO pins, LVDS support, and more. This board also comes with support for up to 64GB of dual-channel DDR5-6400 memory, though the block diagram only shows a single channel (which actually lines up with previous leaks). (Image credit: Advantech)Now, to be clear, prior reports have already revealed the full Wildcat Lake family — we're expecting six SKUs in total — but they weren't seen in a retail product till now, and that signals a launch is due soon. Advantech's datasheet says "preliminary," which means these specs could change between now and then. Regardless of the specifics, it's exciting to see efficient low-power CPUs again that'll likely be cheap enough to prop up an answer to the MacBook Neo. items.titleZh: 英特尔Wildcat Lake低预算CPU再次泄露——OEM首份零售产品数据表确认酷睿7 350/5 320/3 305规格。
items.descriptionZh:
英特尔Wildcat Lake处理器系列近期通过工业计算机厂商Advantech的产品资料首次以商业形态亮相，标志着这一低功耗CPU家族已进入上市前最后的准备阶段。Advantech在其面向嵌入式和边缘计算的MIO-5356单板计算机规格书中，列出了Core 7 350、Core 5 320与Core 3 305三款型号，首次证实了Wildcat Lake将作为正式产品推向市场。

从技术架构来看，Wildcat Lake预计采用与下一代Panther Lake相同的核心设计：性能核（P-core）基于Cougar Cove架构，而低功耗能效核（LP-E core）则采用Darkmont架构。这一组合使其成为Twin Lake（实为Alder Lake-N的 refresh版本）的正式迭代产品，显著区别在于首次为能效核集群引入了现代架构升级，摆脱了此前仅使用Gracemont架构的限制。

具体到已泄露的规格，这三款SKU均采用2个性能核+4个低功耗能效核的异构设计，基础热设计功耗（TDP）为15W，据传在高性能模式（PL2）下可提升至25W。核显配置方面，Core 7 350与Core 5 320预计搭载32个执行单元（EU）的集成显卡，而Core 3 305则配备16个EU。内存支持方面，MIO-5356板卡标称支持双通道DDR5-6400内存，最高容量64GB，但当前框图仅显示单通道，这与早期传闻相符。

Advantech的产品定位凸显了Wildcat Lake的目标应用场景：嵌入式计算与边缘设备。MIO-5356板卡配备了EdgeBMC远程管理、Intel i210与i226控制器驱动的双网口、CAN-FD通信协议、GPIO引脚及LVDS显示支持等工业特性，非常适合物联网网关、数字标牌、轻型边缘服务器等低功耗高可靠场景。

尽管此前已有路线图显示Wildcat Lake家族将包含六款SKU，但此次通过OEM产品资料的曝光是其在零售市场临近上市的关键信号。资料中标注的“初步规格”说明最终参数仍可能调整，但整体方向已明确：英特尔正通过架构改进与能效优化，在超低功耗领域打造兼具性能与成本竞争力的产品线。其潜在对标产品包括苹果MacBook Air使用的定制芯片，有望在入门级移动设备与嵌入式市场形成新的竞争格局。随着更多OEM产品的出现，Wildcat Lake的完整性能表现与市场定位将在近期进一步清晰。

items.title: PlayStation 3 emulator makes Cell CPU 'breakthrough' that improves performance in all games — 'All CPUs can benefit from this, from low-end to high-end!' says RPCS3 devs

Subscribe to our newsletter Developers behind the open-source PlayStation 3 emulator RPCS3 claim that they’ve achieved a breakthrough in emulating the PS3's Cell Broadband Engine processor, with lead developer Elad discovering previously unrecognized SPU usage patterns and writing new code paths to generate more efficient native PC output from them. The improvement benefits every game in the emulator's library, with Twisted Metal, one of the most SPU-intensive titles, showing a 5% to 7% average FPS improvement between builds v0.0.40-19096 and v0.0.40-19151.The PS3's Cell processor paired a PowerPC-based PPU with up to seven Synergistic Processing Units, each a 128-bit SIMD co-processor with its own 256KB of local store memory. RPCS3 emulates SPU workloads by recompiling the original Cell instructions into native x86 code using LLVM and ASMJIT backends. The quality of that translation determines how much host CPU time each emulated SPU cycle consumes.SPU emulation is the largest CPU bottleneck in RPCS3. While the PS3 could run up to six SPUs simultaneously for game workloads, each one must be recompiled and executed on a host CPU thread. Elad's contribution identifies new patterns in how PS3 games use SPU instructions and implements more efficient recompilation for them.Article continues below You may like RPCS3 Emulator boasts over 1500 FPS on the Minecraft title screen Sony will bring ML-based frame generation to PlayStation consoles High-end Android phones are now powerful enough to emulate the PC version of Cyberpunk 2077 We have achieved a new breakthrough on emulating PS3's Cell CPU!Elad discovered new SPU usage patterns and coded ways to generate more optimised PC code from them - benefitting all games!Twisted Metal, one of the most SPU-intensive games, sees a 5-7% Average FPS improvement. pic.twitter.com/x29X4C5JnVApril 3, 2026This means tighter host-side machine code for the same SPU workloads, reducing CPU overhead across the board. RPCS3 shared side-by-side Twisted Metal video comparisons showing the frame rate gain, and noted that the cutscene used for demonstration features dynamic lighting, NPC positioning, and environmental effects that change on every run, accounting for minor visual differences between captures.RPCS3 said the optimization benefits all CPUs, from low-end to high-end, and cited user reports of improved audio rendering and slightly better performance in Gran Turismo 5 on a dual-core AMD Athlon 3000G, a budget APU that you’d expect to struggle with PS3 emulation.Elad, known in RPCS3's codebase as elad335, has a long track record of SPU optimization work on the project. His June 2024 SPU optimizations delivered 30% to 100% performance gains on four-core, four-thread CPU configurations, with titles like Demon's Souls seeing doubled frame rates on constrained hardware.In March, RPCS3 demonstrated over 1,500 FPS on Minecraft PS3 Edition's title screen, a benchmark the project used to illustrate the efficiency of its recompilation pipeline. A few weeks later, in the latest SPU improvement, the project also added new Arm64 SDOT and UDOT instruction optimizations to accelerate SPU emulation on Arm hardware, including Apple Silicon Macs and Snapdragon X laptops.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsorsRPCS3 currently lists over 70% of the PS3's game library as playable and supports Windows, Linux, macOS, and FreeBSD, and added native Arm64 architecture support in late 2024. items.author: Luke James
items.titleZh: PS3模拟器实现Cell处理器重大突破：所有游戏性能提升！RPCS3开发者称：“从低端到高端，所有CPU都将受益于此。”
items.descriptionZh:
开源PlayStation 3模拟器RPCS3的开发团队宣布，其在模拟PS3搭载的Cell宽带处理器（Cell Broadband Engine）方面取得了新的技术突破。该突破由核心开发人员Elad主导，他通过识别此前未被察觉的协同处理单元（SPU）指令使用模式，并编写新的代码路径，从而能够生成更高效的原生PC代码。这项改进惠及模拟器游戏库中的所有游戏，其中对SPU依赖度极高的游戏《Twisted Metal》在版本v0.0.40-19096与v0.0.40-19151之间，平均帧率提升了5%至7%。

**背景与架构挑战**
PS3采用的Cell处理器是一个异构多核架构，其核心由一个基于PowerPC的通用处理器单元（PPU）和最多七个协同处理单元（SPU）组成。每个SPU都是一个128位的SIMD协处理器，拥有独立的256KB本地存储。RPCS3模拟器通过LLVM和ASMJIT后端，将原始的Cell指令（特别是SPU指令）动态重编译为主机CPU（x86等架构）可执行的原生代码。这一翻译过程的质量直接决定了模拟每个SPU周期所需消耗的主机CPU时间，使得SPU模拟长期以来都是RPCS3中最大的CPU性能瓶颈。在PS3上，游戏工作负载最多可同时使用六个SPU，而在模拟环境中，每一个SPU都必须在主机的一个CPU线程上进行重编译和执行。

**核心技术原理与创新点**
本次突破的核心在于，开发人员Elad深入分析了PS3游戏程序中SPU指令的实际使用模式，发现了此前未被识别的特定规律或模式。基于这些新发现，他设计并实现了针对这些模式的、更优化的重编译逻辑。简单来说，新的代码生成器能够为相同的SPU工作负载，产出更紧凑、效率更高的主机侧机器码，从而普遍降低了CPU开销。

**性能提升与效果验证**
RPCS3团队通过《Twisted Metal》的并排视频对比展示了帧率提升的效果。他们特别指出，用于演示的过场动画包含动态光照、NPC位置变化和随每次运行而改变的环境特效，这解释了视频对比中存在的细微视觉差异。此次优化并非仅对高端硬件有效，而是对所有级别的CPU都有益处。团队引用用户报告称，即使在像AMD Athlon 3000G这样的低端双核APU（本应在PS3模拟中表现吃力）上，《Gran Turismo 5》的音效渲染和整体性能也获得了轻微改善。

开发人员Elad（在代码库中名为elad335）在SPU优化方面有着长期的贡献记录。早在2024年6月，他主导的SPU优化就曾在四核四线程的CPU配置上带来了30%至100%的性能提升，使得《恶魔之魂》等游戏在受限硬件上的帧率翻倍。今年3月，RPCS3还展示了在《Minecraft PS3 Edition》标题屏幕上实现超过1500 FPS的成绩，用以证明其重编译流水线的高效性。

**跨平台影响与生态进展**
值得一提的是，本次优化浪潮也延伸至Arm架构。项目近期新增了针对Arm64架构SDOT和UDOT指令的优化，旨在加速基于Arm硬件的SPU模拟，这包括苹果Silicon Mac和高通骁龙X笔记本电脑。RPCS3自2024年末已添加原生Arm64架构支持，目前其支持Windows、Linux、macOS和FreeBSD等多个操作系统。

根据RPCS3的兼容性列表，目前已有超过70%的PS3游戏库被列为“可玩”。这一持续的技术优化不仅提升了现有可玩游戏的体验和硬件需求门槛，也为将来兼容更多游戏、在更广泛设备上实现流畅模拟奠定了坚实基础。

items.title: Apple approves drivers that let AMD and Nvidia eGPUs run on Mac — software designed for AI, though, and not built for gaming
items.description: The company behind the tiny box AI accelerator says that its macOS driver for Nvidia eGPUs has just been signed by Apple, making it a legitimate software for Macs and no longer needs workarounds to work with the device.

Subscribe to our newsletter Apple has just reportedly signed drivers for Nvidia eGPUs, allowing them to finally work on Apple silicon devices. Tiny Corp said in its X post that the company has finally approved the software, letting users pair the GPUs with Macs for AI LLM processing. In fact, the company claims that installing the drivers is now so easy that “a Qwen could do it.” The company first tested an eGPU on Apple Silicon in May 2025, but now that it’s supported by Apple, it means that users no longer have to use workarounds for supported hardware, like disabling System Integrity Protection, to get the system working.If you have a Thunderbolt or USB4 eGPU and a Mac, today is the day you've been waiting for! Apple finally approved our driver for both AMD and NVIDIA. It's so easy to install now a Qwen could do it, then it can run that Qwen... pic.twitter.com/daUsyBHh1WApril 1, 2026Tiny Corp is the company behind the tinybox, an AI accelerator built around four high-end GPUs. It was famously known for butting heads with AMD due to driver issues, with AMD CEO Dr. Lisa Su stepping in just to get things right. At the moment, the company is selling the red v2, which is powered by four AMD 9070XTs and costs $12,000, and the green v2 Blackwell, which costs $65,000 and has four RTX Pro 6000 Blackwell GPUs. It’s also planning to launch the exabox in 2027, which will come with 720 RDNA5 AT0 XL GPUs to deliver around 1 exaflop of computing power for around $10 million.High-end Apple computers recently became popular with the rise of AI agents like OpenClaw. In fact, this frenzy has driven a shortage of Macs that came with massive amounts of Unified Memory, with the delivery window pushed from six days to six weeks. It has even gotten to the point that Cupertino no longer offers the 512GB Unified Memory option for the Mac Studio, while the 256GB model received a $400 price bump.Article continues below You may like OpenClaw-fueled ordering frenzy creates Apple Mac shortage China expected to approve H200 imports in early 2026 Cyberpunk 2077 runs on MacBook Neo at over 30 FPS This custom driver seemingly did not come from the GPU maker, though, with Tiny Corp seemingly working on it on its own. Subsequently, this means that the driver is designed for running AI LLMs and not for gaming, surely disappointing people who don’t want to own two different PCs for work and entertainment. Nevertheless, this is still a game-changer for people working with artificial intelligence, as they could now potentially do training or inference (with some limitations) without needing a dedicated AI supercomputer like Tiny Box. items.titleZh: 苹果批准驱动程序：AMD和Nvidia外置显卡可在Mac运行。不过该软件专为AI设计，并非为游戏打造。
items.descriptionZh:
近日，苹果公司已正式批准了由Tiny Corp开发的Nvidia和AMD外置显卡（eGPU）驱动程序，这使得搭载苹果自研芯片（Apple Silicon）的Mac设备首次能够原生支持外部高端GPU，主要用于AI大语言模型（LLM）的处理任务。这一突破解决了长期以来Apple Silicon Mac无法直接利用eGPU进行高性能计算的问题。

此前，用户在Apple Silicon设备上使用eGPU需要复杂的变通方法，例如禁用系统完整性保护（System Integrity Protection）。而如今，通过官方批准的驱动，安装过程变得极其简单——Tiny Corp甚至在社交平台上调侃道“连Qwen（一款AI模型）都能完成安装”。该驱动通过Thunderbolt或USB4接口连接eGPU，但需要注意的是，它专为AI计算负载优化，并非为图形渲染或游戏设计，这意味着希望用Mac同时兼顾工作和娱乐的用户可能需要另作考虑。

Tiny Corp是一家专注于AI加速硬件的公司，以其搭载多块高端GPU的“tinybox”系列产品闻名。该公司曾因驱动问题与AMD产生公开分歧，最终AMD CEO苏姿丰博士亲自介入才得以解决。目前其产品线包括：售价12,000美元、搭载四块AMD Radeon PRO 9070XT的“red v2”；以及售价高达65,000美元、搭载四块NVIDIA RTX Pro 6000 Blackwell GPU的“green v2 Blackwell”。此外，公司还计划于2027年推出“exabox”，该设备将集成720块AMD RDNA5架构的AT0 XL GPU，提供约1 ExaFLOP的算力，预计售价在一千万美元左右。

此次驱动获批正值高端Mac因AI代理（如OpenClaw）的兴起而需求激增之际。市场对配备大容量统一内存的Mac需求如此旺盛，甚至导致了供货短缺——交货周期从6天延长至6周。苹果也因此调整了产品线，不再为Mac Studio提供512GB统一内存选项，并将256GB版本的价格提高了400美元。

这一进展对于AI开发者和研究人员而言意义重大。他们现在可以在Mac平台上，利用外置GPU进行一定规模的模型训练和推理任务，降低了对tinybox这类专用AI超算设备的绝对依赖。尽管性能可能无法与顶级专用设备媲美，且存在一定限制，但这无疑为移动和桌面AI工作流提供了更灵活、更强大的混合计算解决方案。同时，这也标志着苹果生态与高性能计算硬件（特别是Nvidia GPU）在AI领域的一次重要融合。

history.title: AMD's upcoming Ryzen 9 9950X3D2 listed around $1,000 at several retailers across Canada and the UK — New flagship dual-cache CPU might demand a hefty premium
history.description: Listings for the 9950X3D2 have started to pop up at many different vendors, with some even listing preliminary prices. We found the CPU going for roughly $1,000 at two Canadian retailers, and just a smidge below that at a UK-based website. For context, the standard 9950X3D with 3D V-Cache on only one CCD launched at $699.

Subscribe to our newsletter AMD's Ryzen 9 9950X3D2 entered the rumor mill last year and was a glaring omission from the company's CES 2026 show, but it was finally made official last month with an announcement video. However, AMD did not unveil the chip's price, which is expected to demand a hefty premium given the monstrous specs. Now, new listings have popped up around the globe that suggest the CPU will cost around $1,000, but do be aware that these could be placeholder prices and are, naturally, subject to change.The first two listings come from Canada — on PC-Canada.com, the 9950X3D2 is listed for $1,373.99 CAD, which translates to roughly $985 USD. Similarly, on shopBRC.com, the 9950X3D2 is going for $1,375 CAD, so basically $985 USD as well. Across the pond, in the United Kingdom, a retailer by the name of GamingKit has the CPU listed for 905.82 GBP (~$1,197 USD) with VAT, and 725.54 GBP (~$960) without it.Overall, we're looking at roughly $1,000 as the asking price for the 9950X3D2, but keep in mind that AMD hasn't announced the MSRP yet, so all this is subject to change. Despite its flagship stature, the Ryzen 9 9950X3D2 will likely not land around $1,000 because the chip one tier below it, the 9950X3D, launched at $699. A more premium version of the same CPU, therefore, would likely be $100, or possibly $200, more expensive.Article continues below You may like AMD Ryzen 9 9950X3D2 unveiled as first dual-cache X3D CPU Where to buy AMD's Ryzen 7 9850X3D AMD's next gaming champ to debut at $499, and you can already buy it ahead of launch Image 1 of 3(Image credit: Future)(Image credit: Future)(Image credit: Future)As a reminder, the 9950X3D2's claim to fame is its enormous 192 MB of L3 cache, made possible by stacking it atop (underneath, actually) both core clusters. We're looking at 96 MB per CCD; 32 MB is the native on-die L3 cache, and 64 MB is the added X3D cache. There's a total of 208 MB of combined cache on the 9950X3D2, which has pushed its TDP to 200W, up from 170W on the standard 9950X3D.The chip features 16 cores and 32 threads, based on the Zen 5 microarchitecture, that can boost up to 5.6 GHz. AMD is marketing it as its top-end CPU for both gaming and productivity, so all that remains to see is what the 9950X3D2 will actually cost. Let's just hope AMD isn't inspired by Overclockers UK, where it has a placeholder price of a casual 100,000 GBP (~$132,000 USD)Searching the part number on Google brings up many more listings from around the world, but none of them have prices. We even found the 9950X3D2 listed on B&H with pre-orders opening on April 22, which is the official release date AMD announced. These retailers might have stock ready to go, but can't actually sell it due to the purchase embargo.Even though this is the world's first dual-cache consumer CPU, Intel is also working on dual-compute tile SKUs for its next-gen Nova Lake-S family, which is said to carry up to 288 MB of bLLC (Big Last Level Cache) that will compete with AMD's X3D chips. Of course, that lineup will compete with AMD's own next-gen Zen 6 (and Zen 6 X3D), but it's nonetheless exciting to see the CPU wars return with such ferocity once again.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.

history.titleZh: AMD Ryzen 9 9950X3D2在加拿大与英国多零售商处定价约1000美元——新款旗舰双缓存CPU或面临高昂溢价
history.descriptionZh:
AMD Ryzen 9 9950X3D2处理器于上月通过官方视频正式发布，此前它已流传于传闻中，并在CES 2026大会上缺席。尽管AMD公布了这款旗舰处理器，但未透露其价格，仅暗示其因规格强大而可能定价高昂。目前，全球多个零售商已列出该处理器的预售价格，普遍指向约1000美元价位，但这些价格可能仅为占位符，最终定价仍待AMD官方确认。

从技术角度来看，Ryzen 9 9950X3D2的最大亮点在于其创新的双缓存设计。该处理器基于Zen 5微架构，拥有16个核心和32个线程，最高加速频率可达5.6 GHz。其L3缓存总量达到192 MB，这是通过在每个核心复合体（CCD）上叠加缓存实现的：每个CCD包含32 MB原生片上L3缓存以及64 MB通过3D堆叠技术添加的X3D缓存，因此每个CCD具备96 MB L3缓存。加上L2缓存，处理器总缓存容量高达208 MB。这一设计也使得其热设计功耗（TDP）提升至200W，高于标准版9950X3D的170W。

性能方面，AMD将9950X3D2定位为面向顶级游戏和高负载生产力应用的高端CPU。巨大的缓存容量能显著降低内存延迟，提升对缓存敏感型工作负载（如游戏、渲染、编译等）的性能。虽然目前尚无官方基准测试数据，但其缓存规模的翻倍式增长预计将带来可观的性能提升，尤其是在游戏帧率和复杂计算任务的响应速度上。

从市场定价看，现有零售商报价包括：加拿大PC-Canada.com和shopBRC.com分别标价约1374加元（约合985美元）；英国GamingKit含税报价约906英镑（约1197美元），不含税约726英镑（约960美元）。综合来看，价格区间集中在1000美元左右。然而，考虑到其下一档型号9950X3D首发价为699美元，作为更高级版本，9950X3D2的最终溢价可能在100至200美元之间，因此实际建议零售价可能低于当前流出的占位价格。值得一提的是，英国Overclockers甚至一度列出高达10万英镑的夸张占位价，这显然不具参考性。

该处理器的技术影响深远：它是全球首款采用双缓存设计的消费级CPU，标志着3D堆叠缓存技术进入新阶段。这一创新不仅提升了单颗处理器的性能上限，也为未来多CCD与缓存堆叠的结合设立了新标杆。与此同时，竞争对手英特尔也在积极布局，其下一代Nova Lake-S家族预计将搭载最高288 MB的大容量末级缓存（bLLC），直接对标AMD的X3D系列产品。尽管英特尔新品将与AMD的Zen 6世代竞争，但当前9950X3D2的推出无疑加剧了高端CPU市场的技术角逐。

应用场景上，Ryzen 9 9950X3D2主要面向追求极致性能的用户群体，包括高端游戏玩家、专业内容创作者、工程师及科研人员。其大缓存设计特别适合处理大型数据集、实时仿真、高清视频剪辑及新一代高负载游戏引擎。

目前，多家零售商（如B&H）已列出该处理器，并显示预售将于4月22日开放，这与AMD公布的正式发售日期一致。虽然零售商可能已有库存，但因购买禁令限制，尚未正式开售。随着发售日临近，AMD预计将公布官方定价与性能评测，届时这款革命性处理器的市场表现将真正见分晓。

Subscribe to our newsletter Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) has issued a clear public warning to the U.S. that any damage inflicted on Iran’s power infrastructure will be met with decisive retaliation. Specifically, IRGC spokesperson Brigadier General Ebrahim Zolfaghari threatened the “complete and utter annihilation” of U.S. and Israeli facilities. The ‘hidden’ $30 billion Stargate AI datacenter in Abu Dhabi was singled out as a juicy target for Iranian destruction later in the video. The threats come on the heels of Iran reportedly delivering enough damage via rocket strikes to some Amazon AWS data centers that they have shut down.Iran leveling upThey released a video of threatening to strike 1GW Stargate AI datacenter in the UAE.The data center is hidden on Google maps they even shown that pic.twitter.com/LuOGIp3BVjApril 3, 2026Go deeper with TH Premium: AI and data centers (Image credit: Microsoft)Photonics and high-speed data movement is the next big AI bottleneckThe data center cooling state of playMassive AI data center buildouts are squeezing energy suppliesUltra Ethernet: The data center interconnection of tomorrowAbove, you can see and hear Zolfaghari make the headlining threats against U.S. action in Iran. “Should the USA proceed with its threats concerning Iran’s power plant facilities the following retaliatory measures shall be promptly enacted,” declares the military spokesperson. “All power plants, energy infrastructure, and information and communications technology of the Zionist regime, and all similar companies within the region that have American shareholders shall face complete and utter annihilation.”After the remarks from Zolfaghari, the video switches to a shot of the Earth from space, which zooms into Abu Dhabi on Google Maps. A zone not far from the coast is then centered on, showing an apparently ‘empty’ area of desert. However, a message is overlaid on this bleak view, stating “Nothing stays hidden to our sight, though hidden by Google.” The video then switches to a ‘night vision’ view of the same area of the map with the full extent of the Stargate AI datacenter in Abu Dhabi clear to see.Article continues below You may like Iran claims it has hit Oracle data center in Dubai, Amazon data center in Bahrain Iran issues direct strike threat to Nvidia, Microsoft, Apple, Google, 14 other US tech companies Iran threatens Nvidia, Microsoft, other tech companies with strikes over alleged attack on Tehran bank Image 1 of 4(Image credit: IRGC video)(Image credit: IRGC video)(Image credit: IRGC video)(Image credit: IRGC video)Escalation potential or a bluff?One might query why Iran hasn’t already struck targets like the Stargate AI data center during the last month of hostilities if it were at all possible. It has already inflicted enough damage to disrupt operations at some Amazon AWS data centers. Perhaps these were just ‘lucky’ shots that managed to get through defenses deployed in the Gulf States. Moreover, Iran has made similar threats against Nvidia, Microsoft, Apple, Google, and 14 other U.S. tech companies over recent weeks.With neither side looking like it will cool down the rhetoric and throttle back on the use of force right now, we might actually find out whether Iran can mount a devastating attack on U.S. business-related data centers or not. There will be lives at stake, of course, people are working at these facilities, so it isn’t all about the $30 billion that has been sunk into these huge projects in the Middle East. history.titleZh: 伊朗威胁彻底毁灭OpenAI在阿布扎比的300亿美元"星际之门"AI数据中心——政权发布视频展示ChatGPT制造商首座1吉瓦级数据中心的卫星图像
history.descriptionZh:
伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）近日公开警告美国，若伊朗的电力基础设施遭到攻击，将对美国和以色列的相关设施进行“彻底毁灭性”报复。在发布的视频中，IRGC发言人埃布拉希姆·佐尔法加里准将特别点名了位于阿布扎比、价值约300亿美元的“Stargate”AI数据中心作为潜在打击目标，并展示了该中心在谷歌地图上被隐藏的区域，通过夜间视图揭示了其全貌。这一威胁紧随伊朗此前对亚马逊AWS数据中心造成破坏的报道，显示出地缘政治冲突正迅速蔓延至关键数字基础设施领域。

从技术背景来看，“Stargate”AI数据中心代表了当前AI算力基础设施的尖端水平，其规模高达1吉瓦（GW），专注于支持大规模人工智能训练与推理任务。数据中心的核心技术瓶颈正从传统计算转向光子学和高速数据移动——光子学技术利用光信号替代电信号进行数据传输，能显著提升带宽和能效，但面临集成复杂性和成本挑战；高速数据移动则涉及超以太网（Ultra Ethernet）等新型互连协议，旨在优化数据中心内部及跨数据中心的通信效率，以应对AI模型参数爆炸式增长带来的数据传输延迟问题。此外，大规模AI数据中心的建设加剧了能源供应压力，冷却技术成为关键创新点，例如采用液冷或浸没式冷却方案来管理高密度算力产生的热量，确保系统稳定运行。

在性能参数方面，“Stargate”数据中心作为中东地区的核心AI枢纽，其1GW的功耗规模相当于一座大型发电站的输出，投资额高达300亿美元，突显了AI基础设施的资本密集特性。与常规云数据中心相比，此类专用AI设施通常搭载英伟达、AMD等公司的先进AI芯片（如GPU或ASIC），通过高速互连实现千卡乃至万卡集群，以支持万亿参数模型的训练。然而，新闻中未提供具体的算力对比数据，但参考行业趋势，这类数据中心旨在提供每秒百亿亿次（ExaFLOPs）级别的AI计算能力，推动下一代大语言模型和生成式AI应用的发展。

技术影响和应用场景深远。一方面，AI数据中心成为地缘政治中的战略目标，暴露了全球数字基础设施在冲突中的脆弱性，可能迫使科技公司重新评估数据中心的地理分布和安全措施，例如加强物理防护或采用分布式架构。另一方面，此类威胁事件可能延缓AI创新步伐，因为数据中心的中断会影响模型训练和服务部署，波及云计算、自动驾驶、医疗AI等依赖大规模算力的行业。从长远看，这或加速对边缘计算和去中心化AI解决方案的探索，以降低集中式风险。

总体而言，IRGC的威胁不仅凸显了军事冲突与科技产业的交织，也反映了AI数据中心作为国家关键资产的重要性。随着AI技术持续渗透各领域，保障其基础设施的韧性和安全将成为全球性挑战，同时推动光子学、高效冷却和能源管理技术的创新迭代。未来，行业需在性能提升与风险缓解之间寻求平衡，以维持AI生态的稳定发展。

history.title: Intel's upcoming Wildcat Lake low-budget CPUs leak out again — OEM confirms specs for Core 7 350, Core 5 320, & Core 3 305 in first retail product datasheet
history.description: Wildcat Lake is Intel's upcoming family of low-budget and low-power CPUs intended for OEMs. We've already seen many leaks surrounding this family, but now a new product from Advantech has listed three SKUs in a datasheet for its MIO-5356 SBC. This confirms the specs from prior leaks and signals that a launch is due soon.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 12 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Tom's Hardware Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware Newsletter Get Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox. You are now subscribed Your newsletter sign-up was successful An account already exists for this email address, please log in. Subscribe to our newsletter Intel has been working on its Wildcat Lake CPUs for a while now, but it's only recently that we've started to get numerous leaks surrounding this family. A couple of weeks ago, we covered the Core 5 304, which appeared on Geekbench and was twice as fast as its predecessor. Today, an OEM by the name of Advantech has indirectly confirmed specs for three more SKUs as part of the first official, commercially available Wildcat Lake product.Go deeper with TH Premium: CPU (Image credit: Tom's Hardware)CPU scaling with DLSSRyzen to the top: How AMD innovated in the gaming CPU marketHow ARM is working its way into PCsAMD CES 2026 gaming trends press Q&A roundtable transcriptAdvantech listed the Core 7 350, Core 5 320, and Core 3 305 for its MIO-5356 single-board computer, which is intended for embedded and edge use cases. The datasheet provided on the website mentions these chips as options to kit out the MIO-5356 with. They all have the same 2P+4LP-E core layout with 15W TDPs, though it's rumored that they can go up to 25W in PL2. The Core 7 320 and Core 5 320 seemingly carry 32 EUs while the Core 3 305 has 16 EUs for its iGPU. (Image credit: Advantech)Wildcat Lake is expected to use the Cougar Cove architecture for P-cores and Darkmont for LP-E cores, which would bring it to parity with Panther Lake. That's why this series is supposed to be branded under the Core 300 family, just without the "Ultra" moniker. Wildcat Lake is the successor to Twin Lake, which itself was a refresh of Alder Lake-N; both of those only had Gracemont E-cores.Article continues below You may like Intel's "Wildcat Lake" Core 3 304 is twice as fast in single-core performance versus last-gen Intel keeps socket LGA 1700 alive with new P-core-only CPUs Intel Bartlett Lake-S CPUs reportedly wield 12 blazing P-cores and 5.8 GHz boost The MIO-5356 has other niche features such as EdgeBMC remote management, dual LAN ports powered by Intel i210 and i226 controllers, CAN-FD communication protocol, GPIO pins, LVDS support, and more. This board also comes with support for up to 64GB of dual-channel DDR5-6400 memory, though the block diagram only shows a single channel (which actually lines up with previous leaks). (Image credit: Advantech)Now, to be clear, prior reports have already revealed the full Wildcat Lake family — we're expecting six SKUs in total — but they weren't seen in a retail product till now, and that signals a launch is due soon. Advantech's datasheet says "preliminary," which means these specs could change between now and then. Regardless of the specifics, it's exciting to see efficient low-power CPUs again that'll likely be cheap enough to prop up an answer to the MacBook Neo. history.titleZh: 英特尔Wildcat Lake低预算CPU再次泄露——OEM首份零售产品数据表确认酷睿7 350/5 320/3 305规格。
history.descriptionZh:
英特尔Wildcat Lake处理器系列近期通过工业计算机厂商Advantech的产品资料首次以商业形态亮相，标志着这一低功耗CPU家族已进入上市前最后的准备阶段。Advantech在其面向嵌入式和边缘计算的MIO-5356单板计算机规格书中，列出了Core 7 350、Core 5 320与Core 3 305三款型号，首次证实了Wildcat Lake将作为正式产品推向市场。

从技术架构来看，Wildcat Lake预计采用与下一代Panther Lake相同的核心设计：性能核（P-core）基于Cougar Cove架构，而低功耗能效核（LP-E core）则采用Darkmont架构。这一组合使其成为Twin Lake（实为Alder Lake-N的 refresh版本）的正式迭代产品，显著区别在于首次为能效核集群引入了现代架构升级，摆脱了此前仅使用Gracemont架构的限制。

具体到已泄露的规格，这三款SKU均采用2个性能核+4个低功耗能效核的异构设计，基础热设计功耗（TDP）为15W，据传在高性能模式（PL2）下可提升至25W。核显配置方面，Core 7 350与Core 5 320预计搭载32个执行单元（EU）的集成显卡，而Core 3 305则配备16个EU。内存支持方面，MIO-5356板卡标称支持双通道DDR5-6400内存，最高容量64GB，但当前框图仅显示单通道，这与早期传闻相符。

Advantech的产品定位凸显了Wildcat Lake的目标应用场景：嵌入式计算与边缘设备。MIO-5356板卡配备了EdgeBMC远程管理、Intel i210与i226控制器驱动的双网口、CAN-FD通信协议、GPIO引脚及LVDS显示支持等工业特性，非常适合物联网网关、数字标牌、轻型边缘服务器等低功耗高可靠场景。

尽管此前已有路线图显示Wildcat Lake家族将包含六款SKU，但此次通过OEM产品资料的曝光是其在零售市场临近上市的关键信号。资料中标注的“初步规格”说明最终参数仍可能调整，但整体方向已明确：英特尔正通过架构改进与能效优化，在超低功耗领域打造兼具性能与成本竞争力的产品线。其潜在对标产品包括苹果MacBook Air使用的定制芯片，有望在入门级移动设备与嵌入式市场形成新的竞争格局。随着更多OEM产品的出现，Wildcat Lake的完整性能表现与市场定位将在近期进一步清晰。

history.title: PlayStation 3 emulator makes Cell CPU 'breakthrough' that improves performance in all games — 'All CPUs can benefit from this, from low-end to high-end!' says RPCS3 devs
history.description: Developers behind the open-source PlayStation 3 emulator RPCS3 claim that they’ve achieved a breakthrough in emulating the PS3's Cell Broadband Engine processor.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 4 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Tom's Hardware Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware Newsletter Get Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox. You are now subscribed Your newsletter sign-up was successful An account already exists for this email address, please log in. Subscribe to our newsletter Developers behind the open-source PlayStation 3 emulator RPCS3 claim that they’ve achieved a breakthrough in emulating the PS3's Cell Broadband Engine processor, with lead developer Elad discovering previously unrecognized SPU usage patterns and writing new code paths to generate more efficient native PC output from them. The improvement benefits every game in the emulator's library, with Twisted Metal, one of the most SPU-intensive titles, showing a 5% to 7% average FPS improvement between builds v0.0.40-19096 and v0.0.40-19151.The PS3's Cell processor paired a PowerPC-based PPU with up to seven Synergistic Processing Units, each a 128-bit SIMD co-processor with its own 256KB of local store memory. RPCS3 emulates SPU workloads by recompiling the original Cell instructions into native x86 code using LLVM and ASMJIT backends. The quality of that translation determines how much host CPU time each emulated SPU cycle consumes.SPU emulation is the largest CPU bottleneck in RPCS3. While the PS3 could run up to six SPUs simultaneously for game workloads, each one must be recompiled and executed on a host CPU thread. Elad's contribution identifies new patterns in how PS3 games use SPU instructions and implements more efficient recompilation for them.Article continues below You may like RPCS3 Emulator boasts over 1500 FPS on the Minecraft title screen Sony will bring ML-based frame generation to PlayStation consoles High-end Android phones are now powerful enough to emulate the PC version of Cyberpunk 2077 We have achieved a new breakthrough on emulating PS3's Cell CPU!Elad discovered new SPU usage patterns and coded ways to generate more optimised PC code from them - benefitting all games!Twisted Metal, one of the most SPU-intensive games, sees a 5-7% Average FPS improvement. pic.twitter.com/x29X4C5JnVApril 3, 2026This means tighter host-side machine code for the same SPU workloads, reducing CPU overhead across the board. RPCS3 shared side-by-side Twisted Metal video comparisons showing the frame rate gain, and noted that the cutscene used for demonstration features dynamic lighting, NPC positioning, and environmental effects that change on every run, accounting for minor visual differences between captures.RPCS3 said the optimization benefits all CPUs, from low-end to high-end, and cited user reports of improved audio rendering and slightly better performance in Gran Turismo 5 on a dual-core AMD Athlon 3000G, a budget APU that you’d expect to struggle with PS3 emulation.Elad, known in RPCS3's codebase as elad335, has a long track record of SPU optimization work on the project. His June 2024 SPU optimizations delivered 30% to 100% performance gains on four-core, four-thread CPU configurations, with titles like Demon's Souls seeing doubled frame rates on constrained hardware.In March, RPCS3 demonstrated over 1,500 FPS on Minecraft PS3 Edition's title screen, a benchmark the project used to illustrate the efficiency of its recompilation pipeline. A few weeks later, in the latest SPU improvement, the project also added new Arm64 SDOT and UDOT instruction optimizations to accelerate SPU emulation on Arm hardware, including Apple Silicon Macs and Snapdragon X laptops.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsorsRPCS3 currently lists over 70% of the PS3's game library as playable and supports Windows, Linux, macOS, and FreeBSD, and added native Arm64 architecture support in late 2024. history.author: Luke James
history.titleZh: PS3模拟器实现Cell处理器重大突破：所有游戏性能提升！RPCS3开发者称：“从低端到高端，所有CPU都将受益于此。”
history.descriptionZh:
开源PlayStation 3模拟器RPCS3的开发团队宣布，其在模拟PS3搭载的Cell宽带处理器（Cell Broadband Engine）方面取得了新的技术突破。该突破由核心开发人员Elad主导，他通过识别此前未被察觉的协同处理单元（SPU）指令使用模式，并编写新的代码路径，从而能够生成更高效的原生PC代码。这项改进惠及模拟器游戏库中的所有游戏，其中对SPU依赖度极高的游戏《Twisted Metal》在版本v0.0.40-19096与v0.0.40-19151之间，平均帧率提升了5%至7%。

**背景与架构挑战**
PS3采用的Cell处理器是一个异构多核架构，其核心由一个基于PowerPC的通用处理器单元（PPU）和最多七个协同处理单元（SPU）组成。每个SPU都是一个128位的SIMD协处理器，拥有独立的256KB本地存储。RPCS3模拟器通过LLVM和ASMJIT后端，将原始的Cell指令（特别是SPU指令）动态重编译为主机CPU（x86等架构）可执行的原生代码。这一翻译过程的质量直接决定了模拟每个SPU周期所需消耗的主机CPU时间，使得SPU模拟长期以来都是RPCS3中最大的CPU性能瓶颈。在PS3上，游戏工作负载最多可同时使用六个SPU，而在模拟环境中，每一个SPU都必须在主机的一个CPU线程上进行重编译和执行。

**核心技术原理与创新点**
本次突破的核心在于，开发人员Elad深入分析了PS3游戏程序中SPU指令的实际使用模式，发现了此前未被识别的特定规律或模式。基于这些新发现，他设计并实现了针对这些模式的、更优化的重编译逻辑。简单来说，新的代码生成器能够为相同的SPU工作负载，产出更紧凑、效率更高的主机侧机器码，从而普遍降低了CPU开销。

**性能提升与效果验证**
RPCS3团队通过《Twisted Metal》的并排视频对比展示了帧率提升的效果。他们特别指出，用于演示的过场动画包含动态光照、NPC位置变化和随每次运行而改变的环境特效，这解释了视频对比中存在的细微视觉差异。此次优化并非仅对高端硬件有效，而是对所有级别的CPU都有益处。团队引用用户报告称，即使在像AMD Athlon 3000G这样的低端双核APU（本应在PS3模拟中表现吃力）上，《Gran Turismo 5》的音效渲染和整体性能也获得了轻微改善。

开发人员Elad（在代码库中名为elad335）在SPU优化方面有着长期的贡献记录。早在2024年6月，他主导的SPU优化就曾在四核四线程的CPU配置上带来了30%至100%的性能提升，使得《恶魔之魂》等游戏在受限硬件上的帧率翻倍。今年3月，RPCS3还展示了在《Minecraft PS3 Edition》标题屏幕上实现超过1500 FPS的成绩，用以证明其重编译流水线的高效性。

**跨平台影响与生态进展**
值得一提的是，本次优化浪潮也延伸至Arm架构。项目近期新增了针对Arm64架构SDOT和UDOT指令的优化，旨在加速基于Arm硬件的SPU模拟，这包括苹果Silicon Mac和高通骁龙X笔记本电脑。RPCS3自2024年末已添加原生Arm64架构支持，目前其支持Windows、Linux、macOS和FreeBSD等多个操作系统。

根据RPCS3的兼容性列表，目前已有超过70%的PS3游戏库被列为“可玩”。这一持续的技术优化不仅提升了现有可玩游戏的体验和硬件需求门槛，也为将来兼容更多游戏、在更广泛设备上实现流畅模拟奠定了坚实基础。

history.title: Apple approves drivers that let AMD and Nvidia eGPUs run on Mac — software designed for AI, though, and not built for gaming
history.description: The company behind the tiny box AI accelerator says that its macOS driver for Nvidia eGPUs has just been signed by Apple, making it a legitimate software for Macs and no longer needs workarounds to work with the device.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 2 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Tom's Hardware Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware Newsletter Get Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox. Contact me with news and offers from other Future brands Receive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors By submitting your information you agree to the Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy and are aged 16 or over. You are now subscribed Your newsletter sign-up was successful An account already exists for this email address, please log in. Subscribe to our newsletter Apple has just reportedly signed drivers for Nvidia eGPUs, allowing them to finally work on Apple silicon devices. Tiny Corp said in its X post that the company has finally approved the software, letting users pair the GPUs with Macs for AI LLM processing. In fact, the company claims that installing the drivers is now so easy that “a Qwen could do it.” The company first tested an eGPU on Apple Silicon in May 2025, but now that it’s supported by Apple, it means that users no longer have to use workarounds for supported hardware, like disabling System Integrity Protection, to get the system working.If you have a Thunderbolt or USB4 eGPU and a Mac, today is the day you've been waiting for! Apple finally approved our driver for both AMD and NVIDIA. It's so easy to install now a Qwen could do it, then it can run that Qwen... pic.twitter.com/daUsyBHh1WApril 1, 2026Tiny Corp is the company behind the tinybox, an AI accelerator built around four high-end GPUs. It was famously known for butting heads with AMD due to driver issues, with AMD CEO Dr. Lisa Su stepping in just to get things right. At the moment, the company is selling the red v2, which is powered by four AMD 9070XTs and costs $12,000, and the green v2 Blackwell, which costs $65,000 and has four RTX Pro 6000 Blackwell GPUs. It’s also planning to launch the exabox in 2027, which will come with 720 RDNA5 AT0 XL GPUs to deliver around 1 exaflop of computing power for around $10 million.High-end Apple computers recently became popular with the rise of AI agents like OpenClaw. In fact, this frenzy has driven a shortage of Macs that came with massive amounts of Unified Memory, with the delivery window pushed from six days to six weeks. It has even gotten to the point that Cupertino no longer offers the 512GB Unified Memory option for the Mac Studio, while the 256GB model received a $400 price bump.Article continues below You may like OpenClaw-fueled ordering frenzy creates Apple Mac shortage China expected to approve H200 imports in early 2026 Cyberpunk 2077 runs on MacBook Neo at over 30 FPS This custom driver seemingly did not come from the GPU maker, though, with Tiny Corp seemingly working on it on its own. Subsequently, this means that the driver is designed for running AI LLMs and not for gaming, surely disappointing people who don’t want to own two different PCs for work and entertainment. Nevertheless, this is still a game-changer for people working with artificial intelligence, as they could now potentially do training or inference (with some limitations) without needing a dedicated AI supercomputer like Tiny Box. history.author: Jowi Morales
history.titleZh: 苹果批准驱动程序：AMD和Nvidia外置显卡可在Mac运行。不过该软件专为AI设计，并非为游戏打造。
history.descriptionZh:
近日，苹果公司已正式批准了由Tiny Corp开发的Nvidia和AMD外置显卡（eGPU）驱动程序，这使得搭载苹果自研芯片（Apple Silicon）的Mac设备首次能够原生支持外部高端GPU，主要用于AI大语言模型（LLM）的处理任务。这一突破解决了长期以来Apple Silicon Mac无法直接利用eGPU进行高性能计算的问题。

此前，用户在Apple Silicon设备上使用eGPU需要复杂的变通方法，例如禁用系统完整性保护（System Integrity Protection）。而如今，通过官方批准的驱动，安装过程变得极其简单——Tiny Corp甚至在社交平台上调侃道“连Qwen（一款AI模型）都能完成安装”。该驱动通过Thunderbolt或USB4接口连接eGPU，但需要注意的是，它专为AI计算负载优化，并非为图形渲染或游戏设计，这意味着希望用Mac同时兼顾工作和娱乐的用户可能需要另作考虑。

Tiny Corp是一家专注于AI加速硬件的公司，以其搭载多块高端GPU的“tinybox”系列产品闻名。该公司曾因驱动问题与AMD产生公开分歧，最终AMD CEO苏姿丰博士亲自介入才得以解决。目前其产品线包括：售价12,000美元、搭载四块AMD Radeon PRO 9070XT的“red v2”；以及售价高达65,000美元、搭载四块NVIDIA RTX Pro 6000 Blackwell GPU的“green v2 Blackwell”。此外，公司还计划于2027年推出“exabox”，该设备将集成720块AMD RDNA5架构的AT0 XL GPU，提供约1 ExaFLOP的算力，预计售价在一千万美元左右。

此次驱动获批正值高端Mac因AI代理（如OpenClaw）的兴起而需求激增之际。市场对配备大容量统一内存的Mac需求如此旺盛，甚至导致了供货短缺——交货周期从6天延长至6周。苹果也因此调整了产品线，不再为Mac Studio提供512GB统一内存选项，并将256GB版本的价格提高了400美元。

这一进展对于AI开发者和研究人员而言意义重大。他们现在可以在Mac平台上，利用外置GPU进行一定规模的模型训练和推理任务，降低了对tinybox这类专用AI超算设备的绝对依赖。尽管性能可能无法与顶级专用设备媲美，且存在一定限制，但这无疑为移动和桌面AI工作流提供了更灵活、更强大的混合计算解决方案。同时，这也标志着苹果生态与高性能计算硬件（特别是Nvidia GPU）在AI领域的一次重要融合。
